_comment: Commander roster for the prototype. C1 reshape per decisions/2026-04-26-prototype-reshape-plan.md (Accepted 2026-04-29) lands the 3 locked civ commanders (Leonidas / Montezuma II / Ragnar Lothbrok) ALONGSIDE the 5 legacy Ash/Nature/Prayer commanders (commander-a..e) per the alongside-and-non-breaking pattern PM ratified for the C1 cardinality break. Legacy 5 stay playable so the existing pick UI keeps running through C1-C2; full removal is the C6 dead-code pass after C3-C5 dismantle the age-loop UI. Locked names per decisions/2026-04-25-q2-real-cultures-direction-ratified.md (Hard reversibility); locked signature-ability names from same — do NOT rename without a new dated decision. Identity-floor fields (passive/signature/long-CD names, 12-line VO bank shape, 20-level XP ladder, 3 cosmetic slots L5/L10/L15) preserved per decisions/2026-04-20-commander-identity-floor.md. All numbers [PROPOSAL] until balance pass. Port target: Godot 4 Resource array (res://data/commanders/*.tres).

leonidas.name: Leonidas
leonidas.lore: "The line is held by men who chose to die at it. Spartan training is not a regimen — it is a covenant. When the wall breaks, I am the wall."

montezuma-ii.name: Montezuma II
montezuma-ii.lore: "The sun is fed by tribute. The tribute is paid in blood. The blood is mine to weigh, and the gods are mine to answer. The Great Sacrifice is not a cost — it is the bargain that lets the next dawn come."

ragnar-lothbrok.name: Ragnar Lothbrok
ragnar-lothbrok.lore: "My sons are my line. The mead hall sings their names before they are born. Berserk is not madness — it is honesty. The Great Heathen Army is what arrives when honesty is shared."

pick: [VO] The longships are at the strand.

commander-a.name: Commander A
commander-a.lore: "He holds a line the way a forefather holds a name. Each shield learns from the last, each wall older and more deliberate than the one before. When the creeps break, they break on a rampart his grandfathers raised."

stats.signature: Warcry: next Sinew tower built this wave is +1 tier

commander-b.name: Commander B
commander-b.lore: "She reads the air like a smith reads a forge. Every spark is a lesson, every lesson a tower lit. Alone, her Ember is a candle. In concert, it is the sunrise of a new age."

stats.signature: Kindling: next tower built this wave is +1 tier

commander-c.name: Commander C
commander-c.lore: "She counts grain the way sergeants count soldiers. Her Forge isn't about iron — it's about the *supply train* behind iron. No tower rises in this lineage that doesn't first pass through her ledger."

stats.signature: Quartermaster: adjacent towers cost 20% less gold this wave

pick: [VO] We'll pay for this in full.

commander-d.name: Commander D
commander-d.lore: "He conducts the wall the way a choir-master conducts a choir. His Crown never kills — it makes the towers nearest to it kill *better*. Alone he is nothing; in concert he is the reason the concert works."

stats.signature: Rally: all towers within aura gain +1 tier damage for 15 seconds

pick: [VO] Let the choir find its key.
victory: [VO] The whole was louder than its parts.

commander-e.name: Commander E
commander-e.lore: "She never fought a creep she couldn't slow down, confuse, or convince to take a different path. Her Veil is a library of tricks the other lineages forgot. Every book on her shelf is a wave that didn't arrive."

stats.signature: Phantom: all enemies in view are slowed 50% for 10 seconds

pick: [VO] Their path is in my margins.
